app.name: ሪኮል
auth.session_expired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
calendar.load_failed: Google Calendar መጫን አልተቻለም። ማስታወሻዎችዎ ከዚህ በታች ይታያሉ።
calendar.proposal_failed: ይህን ክስተት መጨመር አልተቻለም። እንደገና ይሞክሩ ወይም በቅንብሮች Calendar እንደገና ያገናኙ።
chat.editing_message: መልእክት በመስተካከል ላይ — ከዚህ በኋላ እንደገና ለመስራት ላክ
chat.email_card_gmail_copied: Email copied to your clipboard. Open Gmail and paste if the compose screen did not open.
chat.busy: አሁንም በመፍጠር ላይ — ይጠብቁ ወይም stop ይጫኑና እንደገና ይሞክሩ።
chat.model_unavailable: That model isn't responding right now. Pick a different model and try again.
chat.home.starter_help_think_prompt: I want to talk something through — ask me a good opening question.
chat.home.starter_hows_day_prompt: How's my day looking so far — anything you think I should prioritize?
chat.home.starter_plan_day_prompt: Help me plan my day based on what you know about me.
chat.home.starter_quick_thought_prompt: I have a quick thought I want to talk through.
chat.home.starter_reflect_prompt: How did my day go? Help me reflect and wrap up loose ends.
chat.location_confirm_body: Recall uses your location to find nearby places and distances.
chat.location_required_body: Location access is required for nearby searches. Enable it in Settings → Recall → Location, then try again.
chat.quota_nudge_body: የዛሬው ነጻ ገደብ {{pct}}% ተጠቅመዋል። በቀን 500k ቶከን ለ Pro ይሂዱ።
delete.message: ይህ መለያዎን እና ሁሉንም ውሂብዎን በቋሚነት ይሰርዛል። ይህ እርምጃ ሊቀለበስ አይችልም።
delete.title: መለያ ሰርዝ
lists.group_add_hint: ከታች ንጥሎችን ጨምሩ — напр. carrot, cabbage
login.dev_expo_hint: Google Sign-In dev build ይፈልጋል። Dev login በExpo Go ይሰራል።
login.error_bundle: Dev build ከMetro ግንኙነት አጥቷል። `pnpm expo start` ይኑር፣ 앱 reload (⌘R)፣ ወይም Dev login።
login.error_native_module:
Google Sign-In native module የለም። እንደገና build:

cd apps/mobile && pnpm expo run:ios
login.error_not_configured: Google OAuth አልተዋቀረም። EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_* ወደ apps/mobile/.env ጨምሩ፣ rebuild ወይም Dev login ይጠቀሙ።
login.google_unavailable_body:
Google Sign-In በExpo Go አይሰራም። Recallን በMacዎ አንድ ጊዜ build ያድርጉ እና ያንን app ይክፈቱ:

cd apps/mobile
pnpm expo run:ios
login.tagline: ይማሩ፣ ያደራጁ እና ይወያዩ — እርስዎን የሚذكر AI ጋር።
memory.delete_confirm_body: Recall will forget everything in this category until it learns again from your chats.
memory.delete_fact_body: Remove this fact from what Recall remembers about you.
memory.delete_failed: Could not delete memory. Try again.
memory.empty_body: ከሪኮል ጋር ይወያዩ እና ለእርስዎ መሻሻል፣ የመማር ርዕሶች እና እውነታዎችን በራሱ ይማራል።
memory.heading: ሪኮል ስለእርስዎ የሚያውቀው
memory.section_hint: በአንድ ምድብ አንድ ማጠቃለያ — በንግግርዎ እየተዘመነ።
memory.title: ማህደረ ትውስታ
onboarding.learn_body: እንግሊዝኛ፣ ፕሮግራሚንግ እና ሌሎች — እድገትዎን የሚከታተሉ ጥያቄዎች ጋር።
onboarding.organize_body: ማስታወሻዎች፣ የቀን መቁጠሪያ እና የኢሜይል ጥቆማዎች — ሁሉም በአንድ ቦታ።
onboarding.remember_body: ሪኮል ግቦችዎን ይማራል እና ያቆሙበትን ቦታ ይቀጥላል።
onboarding.subtitle: ለመማር እና ለዕለት ተዕለት ሕይወት የእርስዎ የግል AI።
preview.expo_go_banner: This page uses JavaScript — switch to Run with a dev build for live preview, or Share to open in Safari.
privacy.title: የግላዊነት ፖሊሲ
projects.add_word_failed: Could not add that word. Try again.
projects.coming_body: ሪኮል በእያንዳንዱ የመማር ርዕስ ውስጥ ተጨማሪ የመማር መሳሪያዎችን ይጨምራል።
projects.concept_empty: Ask Recall to add topics or skills to track as you study.
projects.create_failed: Could not create this learning topic. Try again.
projects.decks_empty: ቃላትን ለመקבץ ዴክ ፍጠሩ (напр. Week 1, Food)።
projects.delete_body: ይህ ርዕስ እና ካርዶቹ በቋሚነት ይወገዳሉ።
projects.delete_failed: Could not delete this topic. Try again.
projects.empty_body: Track math, English, or programming — one place for what you're studying.
projects.encourage: ቀጥል — በደረጃህ {{count}} ተጨማሪ ቃላትን ለመጨመር ሞክር!
projects.english_topics_hint: Pick one or more. Recall will start with vocabulary at your level and check if the level feels right.
projects.english_topics_label: What do you want to learn?
projects.goal_optional_hint: Optional — exams, timeline, or what success looks like.
projects.goal_placeholder_english: напр. Travel conversation, business emails, pronunciation…
projects.goal_placeholder_math: напр. Algebra for exams, calculus basics, word problems…
projects.goal_placeholder_programming: напр. React hooks, Python basics, system design concepts…
projects.study_launch_failed: የstudy chat መክፈት አልተቻለም። እንደገና ይሞክሩ።
projects.journey_all_done: ሁሉንም starter topics covering — deeper ለማድረግ Recall ask!
projects.kind.programming_hint: Concepts & vocab — code repo አይደለም። GitHub repos በскоро።
projects.level_hint: በጣም ቅርብ የሆነውን ይምረጡ — በኋላ መቀየር ይችላሉ።
projects.lists_empty: እስካሁን lists የለም — vocabulary/study items Recall add ask።
projects.load_failed: Could not load this project. Try again.
projects.math_empty: Ask Recall to add concepts, theorems, or problem types to track as you study.
projects.practice_body: Ask Recall to walk you through a problem at your level, check your work, and suggest what to try next.
projects.programming_language_hint: Recall progress in this language track ያደርጋል።
projects.title: መማር
projects.vocab.coming_body: የቃል ቡድኖች፣ known mark፣ pronunciation፣ example sentences፣ progress tracking እና AI suggestions።

cd apps/mobile && pnpm expo run:ios

settings.data_controls_hint: Download or permanently remove your account data.
settings.delete_desc: Permanently removes your account and all data.
settings.export_desc: JSON copy of your chats, memories, and settings
settings.export_large_message: Your export is about {{size_mb}} MB. The share sheet may truncate very large exports. Continue anyway?
settings.gmail_connect_confirm: Gmail ከRecall sign-in ጋር የተለየ ነው። inbox read-only access ትሰጣለህ።
settings.gmail_desc: Optional — sign-in ከተለየ። chat እና suggested reminders read-only inbox access።
settings.gmail_disconnect_confirm: Gmail ከRecall ይወገድ? sign out alone disconnect አያደርግ።
settings.gmail_expo_go: dev build ይፈልጋል — Expo Go አይገኝም።
settings.gmail_sync_skipped: Gmail is already up to date.
settings.location_denied: Allow location access in your device Settings to use this.
settings.location_expo_go: Location requires a dev build — it is not available in Expo Go.
settings.model_hint: Auto per message best model enable ወይም models yourself pick።
settings.model_unavailable: Not available — server provider API key add።
settings.name_invalid: ከ1 እስከ 80 ፊደላት ያለው ስም ያስገቡ።

settings.push_notifications_desc: Reminders, learning nudges, email suggestions — even when app closed

settings.reminder_lead_desc: How early local reminders fire before due time

todos.empty_body: ለመጀመር ወደ ዝርዝር ጨምር ወይም ማስታወሻ ጨምርን ይንኩ።
todos.empty_list_body: Tap Add to list or create group like Shopping.
todos.notifications_hint: Turn on notifications for reminders (Settings → Reminder alert).
todos.title: ዝርዝሮች እና ማስታወሻዎች
upgrade.body: ሁሉንም ሞዴሎች፣ ከፍተኛ ዕለታዊ ገደቦች እና Recall የትኞቹን ሞዴሎች እንደሚጠቀም ሙሉ ቁጥጥር ይክፈቱ።
upgrade.feature_models: ሁሉም ፕሪሚየም ሞዴሎች — DeepSeek Reasoner፣ Minimax፣ Qwen እና ሌሎች
upgrade.feature_pick: በቅንብሮች ውስጥ የแต่ละ ሞዴሎችን ያብሩ ወይም ያጥፉ
upgrade.title: ወደ Pro ይሂዱ
